title: agrostis mexicana
intro: Agrostis mexicana, also known as Mexican bentgrass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. Traditionally, Agrostis mexicana has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Agrostis mexicana are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis. Agrostis mexicana can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used topically to treat skin irritations and wounds.
